message:
feat(cli,robot,serve,summary): harden session validation, clone registry, fix EOF/error handling

- cli: add ValidateSessionName in add/spawn, introduce resolveCreationProjectDirForSession
  that returns errors instead of empty strings; support map[string]interface{} input in
  sessions.create MCP handler with JSON round-trip decode; validate project name and label
  on create
- robot: return deep clone from GetRobotRegistry() to prevent callers from mutating the
  singleton; add cloneRobotRegistry + supporting helpers
- serve: compare err != io.EOF instead of err.Error() != "EOF" in pipeline resume/cleanup
  handlers; validate min_severity before querying findings in bugs-notify; log w.Write
  errors in checkpoint export
- summary: log LLM summarization failures and fall through to the plain-text fallback
  instead of silently discarding the error

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
